---
title: ""
output: html_document
date: ''
---

<font size=5>Hi-C:
<br>
https://data.4dnucleome.org/resources/data-analysis/hi_c-processing-pipeline </font> 
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>scATAC-seq:
<br>
https://stuartlab.org/signac/articles/pbmc_vignette.html </font>
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>scRNA-seq:
<br>
https://satijalab.org/seurat/articles/pbmc3k_tutorial.html </font>
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>ChIP-seq:
<br>
https://data.4dnucleome.org/resources/data-analysis/chipseq-processing-pipeline </font>
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>ATAC-seq:
<br>
https://data.4dnucleome.org/resources/data-analysis/atacseq-processing-pipeline </font>
<br>
<br>
<font size=5>RNA-seq:
<br>
https://data.4dnucleome.org/resources/data-analysis/rnaseq-processing-pipeline </font>
<br>
<br>
